intended_use: Second Opinion CC is a computer aided detection ("CADe") software to aid dentists in the detection of caries by drawing bounding polygons to highlight the suspected region of interest. It is designed
intended_use_full: Second Opinion CC is a computer aided detection ("CADe") software to aid dentists in the detection of caries by drawing bounding polygons to highlight the suspected region of interest. It is designed to aid dental health professionals to review bitewing and periapical radiographs of permanent teeth in patients 19 years of age or older as a second reader.
ground_truth: Consensus approach based on agreement among at least 3 out of 4 expert readers, each marking suspected caries regions using polygonal contours
other_metrics: wAFROC-FOM: 0.81 (0.77, 0.85); Lesion level sensitivity: 90% (87%, 94%); Average false positives per image: 1.34 (1.20, 1.48); Dice coefficient for true positives: 0.73 (0.71, 0.75)
